vibe: Modern, premium, sleek, 'ChatDay' style, frosted glassmorphism over dark Moroccan neon background.

colors.background: bg-[#050B14] (Fallback only, rely on fixed background image)

layout_and_spacing.global: h-screen w-full flex overflow-hidden fixed inset-0 text-white font-sans

sidebar.desktop: w-72 flex-shrink-0 h-full border-r border-white/10 bg-black/30 backdrop-blur-2xl flex flex-col z-40 transition-all duration-300
sidebar.mobile: fixed inset-y-0 left-0 z-50 transform transition-transform duration-300 w-72

main_content.container: flex-1 flex flex-col relative h-full overflow-hidden
main_content.chat_area: flex-1 overflow-y-auto px-4 md:px-8 pt-8 pb-40 scroll-smooth flex flex-col gap-6
main_content.empty_state: flex-1 flex flex-col items-center justify-center p-8 text-center

input_area.container: absolute bottom-0 left-0 right-0 p-4 md:p-8 bg-gradient-to-t from-black/80 via-black/40 to-transparent pointer-events-none
input_area.bar: max-w-4xl mx-auto rounded-[2rem] pointer-events-auto p-2 flex items-end gap-2

sidebar_navigation.description: Left sidebar mimicking ChatDay, holding New Chat, History, Settings, Languages.
sidebar_navigation.styles: glass_panel_heavy, p-4 flex flex-col gap-4 h-full

items.new_chat_btn: w-full flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-3 rounded-xl bg-white/10 hover:bg-white/20 transition-all border border-white/10 text-white font-medium data-[testid='new-chat-btn']
items.history_item: group flex items-center justify-between px-3 py-2.5 rounded-lg hover:bg-white/5 text-slate-300 hover:text-white transition-colors cursor-pointer data-[testid='history-item']
items.bottom_section: mt-auto pt-4 border-t border-white/10 flex flex-col gap-2

top_bar.description: Subtle top bar for model/voice selection and mobile menu toggle.
top_bar.styles: h-14 px-4 flex items-center justify-between bg-black/20 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-white/5 z-30

empty_state_greeting.description: Centered 'How can I help you?' screen.
empty_state_greeting.styles: max-w-3xl w-full mx-auto space-y-8 flex flex-col items-center
empty_state_greeting.chips_container: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-4 mt-8 w-full
empty_state_greeting.chip: p-5 rounded-2xl glass_panel_light hover:bg-white/10 transition-all cursor-pointer text-left border border-white/10 flex flex-col gap-2 data-[testid='suggestion-chip']

chat_message_bubbles.user_bubble: self-end max-w-[85%] md:max-w-[70%] bg-white/10 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/10 rounded-2xl rounded-tr-sm p-4 text-white shadow-lg
chat_message_bubbles.ai_bubble: self-start max-w-[95%] md:max-w-[80%] bg-transparent p-4 text-white flex flex-col gap-3 group
chat_message_bubbles.actions: flex items-center gap-2 mt-2 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity

bottom_input_bar.description: Premium multiline input, rounded, floating, matching ChatDay exactly.
bottom_input_bar.styles: glass_input w-full p-2 pl-4 flex items-end gap-2 shadow-2xl relative z-40 transition-all focus-within:ring-1 focus-within:ring-white/20
bottom_input_bar.textarea: flex-1 bg-transparent border-0 text-white placeholder-slate-400 focus:ring-0 resize-none max-h-48 min-h-[44px] py-3 text-base outline-none w-full data-[testid='chat-input']
bottom_input_bar.buttons: p-3 rounded-full hover:bg-white/10 text-slate-300 hover:text-white transition-colors flex-shrink-0 flex items-center justify-center data-[testid='action-btn']
bottom_input_bar.send_button: p-3 rounded-full bg-cyan-500 hover:bg-cyan-400 text-black transition-all flex-shrink-0 flex items-center justify-center data-[testid='send-btn']
bottom_input_bar.sign_language_btn: p-3 rounded-full hover:bg-white/10 text-purple-400 hover:text-purple-300 transition-colors flex-shrink-0 flex items-center justify-center data-[testid='sign-language-btn']
bottom_input_bar.voice_mic_btn: p-3 rounded-full hover:bg-white/10 text-rose-400 hover:text-rose-300 transition-colors flex-shrink-0 flex items-center justify-center data-[testid='mic-btn']

voice_and_language_selectors.styles: bg-black/80 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10 rounded-xl text-white outline-none data-[testid='selector']

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: All buttons and interactive elements must transition smoothly with 'transition-all duration-200 ease-in-out'. Change backgrounds via opacity (e.g., hover:bg-white/10).
motion_and_interactions.focus_states: Input areas should not have harsh outlines. Use focus-within on parent containers to subtly brighten the border.
motion_and_interactions.streaming: AI messages must appear token-by-token smoothly. Use a pulsing cursor indicator. No layout jumping.
motion_and_interactions.sidebar_toggle: Smooth slide in/out for mobile using translate-x.
motion_and_interactions.animations: Use framer-motion for mounting/unmounting components. Message bubbles should pop in slightly (scale 0.95 -> 1.0, opacity 0 -> 1).

background_image.description: The app already has a custom full-screen Moroccan background image (a futuristic Moroccan riad with neon circuitry, dark blue tones) which MUST be retained. DO NOT REPLACE IT.

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure the existing custom full-screen Moroccan background image remains perfectly intact. Wrap the entire application in a container where this image is fixed as the background.
Apply 'glassmorphism' aggressively for the UI layers. This means deep background blurs (backdrop-blur-xl or 2xl) and semi-transparent dark or light fills (bg-black/40 or bg-white/5).
Mimic the chatday.ai UI: Left collapsible sidebar with a glass look. Center chat thread that scrolls under a transparent header and a floating bottom input bar.

The input bar MUST be a single pill-shaped or highly rounded box containing all actions: sign-language webcam button, multiline text input, mic button, voice picker, and send button. Use flex and items-end to handle multiline text properly.
Implement the global language selector and voice picker elegantly, likely within Shadcn UI DropdownMenus or Selects modified to have a dark glass theme.
Every interactive element MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case, specifying its role.
Do NOT use pure #000000 or #ffffff for large solid backgrounds; always use transparency over the Moroccan riad image.
Use Lucide-React for all icons (Mic, Video, Send, Menu, Plus, Trash, Settings, Languages).
CRITICAL: The codebase uses .js/.jsx files (not TypeScript). Ensure all new code and modifications are written in JavaScript, avoiding TypeScript syntax entirely.
Make sure to use Framer Motion (installed in package.json) for all subtle enter/exit animations.
